channel.title: Augsburg on Share Hub
channel.description: Recent content in Augsburg on Share Hub

item.title: Augsburg Travel Guide | Roman City 35 Minutes from Munich (2025)
item.description: Augsburg is a historic city 35 minutes from Munich with over 2,000 years of Roman history, and home to the world’s oldest social housing project — the Fuggerei, still operating since 1516.
